decision.reason: batch_execution.throughput_claim_eligible=false; generated-token equality vs independent c=1 did not pass; correctness.generated_token_equality.passed must be true; correctness.generated_token_equality.batch_sequences must equal c1_sequences; correctness.generated_token_equality.mismatches must be empty; profiler_json must be provided under benchmarks/results; compiler_version_file must be a repo-relative path under benchmarks/results; profiler trace was not captured with expected kernels present; profiler.artifact_path must be under benchmarks/results; profiler.source_artifact_path must be a non-empty string; profiler.output_format must be csv; profiler.trace_dir must be a non-empty string; profiler.trace_files must be a non-empty string list; profiler.synthesized_fields must be a string list; profiler.status must be captured; profiler.expected_kernels_present must be true; profiler.trace_kernel_names must be a non-empty string list; profiler.expected_kernel_names must be a non-empty string list; profiler.kernel_durations_ns must be a non-empty object; execution.batch_execution.blockers must be empty; profiler kernel names must include selected projection_dispatch candidate or variant; execution.scheduler_metadata.graph_bucket_stats.kernel_time_histogram_ns has no observations; execution.scheduler_metadata.graph_bucket_stats.kernel_time_histogram_ns observation count must cover graph_bucket_stats.hits

notes: Native retained c>N path uses packed prompt slabs and step_batch_native for decode.
Batch split-K decode remains out of scope; this accepted protocol keeps context < 1024.
